title: Fun Lucky Block
description: Lucky blocks can give you random items, explode you, or kill you.
body:

![hjgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff630871f8b04253baa0399f8a5116926f716b8_0.webp)
[![dfdscfsd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf44c11a8b7ff364632ccde2bcfac4e72131ca2d_0.webp)](https://mcreator.net/)
[![jhgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e03629e989e9744138963451f8877bb5d65aceea.png)](https://discord.gg/j6B8wyYTrk)
[![jhgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59902fedac100ce3cc3249dc677e76281aa597d0.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/interestingmods/projects)
[![jhgj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325f9129543a47168e4871ad996bba93a4bf82c1_0.webp)](https://neoforged.net/)
[![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df5ae65196aa7a4a0aef20e208c0005ff06471f.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/InterestingMods)






![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df61c322385d046a8b0c8315e19b365ab064adc3.png)

 We created a lucky block mod for Minecraft, which is one of the older mods. If the mod receives enough interest, it will get updates.
- It gives off something random when it breaks.
- There are 20 different chances right now.
- Please report any errors.
- We added a craft for the luck block.
